name: Armenian Cracker Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle yeast into warm water in a large bowl and stir until dissolved.
2. Add salt.
3. Combine all-purpose and whole wheat flours and add to the yeast mixture to make stiff dough.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic, 8 to 10 minutes.
5. Shape into a ball. Place in a greased bowl and turn to grease the top.
6. Cover and let rise until doubled in bulk, about 1 1/2 hours.
7. Punch down and let rise again until doubled, about 30 minutes.
8. Divide dough into 8 pieces and roll each out on lightly floured surface to a very thin circle about 9 inches in diameter.
9. Place, one at a time, on a baking sheet and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
10. Bake at 400°F for 5 to 6 minutes, or until the bread appears dry, lightly browned and blistered.
11. Run the palest side under hot broiler until lightly browned.
12. Cool and store in a dry place.
